_comment: FLOOR RATCHET for a11y-ratchet.mjs (EN 301 549 / RGAA). Each value is a MINIMUM: the live count of that a11y signal in museum-frontend/{features,app,shared/ui} must stay >= this. Raise deliberately as coverage grows; lowering requires --update-baseline with justification (a genuine screen removal). Do NOT lower to paper over a regression.
